action.reasoning: Observation: Current best hidden AUC is ~0.7680 from a mostly GRU ensemble; PFA validation AUC is much weaker but may be complementary. Analysis: Before committing evaluation slots to blends, I need quantify PFA complementarity against available neural checkpoints and inspect checkpoint metadata to identify suitable validation-only vs combined models. Decision: run a lightweight inspection script that computes validation AUCs/blend weights for existing checkpoints and prints checkpoint notes/config summaries.
